message:
STUCK LOOP DETECTED — You are repeating read-only commands without progress.
MANDATORY RECOVERY:
1. Do NOT run ls, dir, cat, Get-Content, or view.
2. Create the required files using str_replace_editor create.
3. When all files are created, call finish().
YOUR VERY NEXT ACTION MUST BE a file create or edit — nothing else.
